race.description: Big Dance Day @ Mrc 3 Nov Mdn Hcp
race.comment: WHAT A GENT (6) is racing well on the provincial circuit and finds a much easier contest today on a firmer track. Went hard early and was no match for Satono Jasmine when seventh over 1600m at Gosford. That form has since been franked and can go close here. STRASBELLE (5) will appreciate the claim again third-up after running a much better race when sitting on the speed to finish second over 1280m at this track. Can overcome the sticky draw and play a leading role. KOWLOON MAGNATE (4) encouraging return in the heavy conditions when he knocked up late to run fifth over 1400m at Taree. Drawn the fence and not to be underestimated. LINDA'S PRINCESS (10) has finally drawn a good barrier fourth-up with the tongue-tie going on. Snagged back early and failed to get into the contest when tenth over 1400m at Tamworth. Finds a weaker contest and has solid each-way prospects.
